title: Craft Coffee Flat-Lay
summary: Overhead artisan coffee setup  -  V60 pour-over, beans, linen napkin, warm morning light.
prompt: An overhead flat-lay product shot of a craft coffee setup on a dark walnut wooden table: a brass V60 pour-over dripper, white ceramic mug with steaming dark coffee, scattered roasted whole coffee beans, a small kraft-paper bag of beans with a minimal label, a brass scoop, a folded linen napkin in oatmeal beige. Warm directional morning light from the upper right, deep rich shadows, artisan cafe magazine aesthetic. Square 1:1 composition.
